plot: A group of astronauts travel through a wormhole near Saturn in search of a new home for humanity as Earth faces environmental collapse.
A young wizard discovers he has magical powers and attends a school for wizards where he must battle a dark sorcerer.
A detective investigates a series of gruesome murders in a small town, uncovering a secret society with dark rituals.
Two strangers meet on a train and fall in love despite their vastly different backgrounds and family opposition.
A team of soldiers is sent behind enemy lines to rescue a captured general during World War II.
A group of friends discover an old treasure map and embark on a dangerous adventure to find pirate gold.
A struggling comedian tries to make it big in New York City while dealing with heartbreak and self-doubt.
A serial killer taunts a rookie FBI agent with cryptic clues while committing elaborate murders across the country.
In a dystopian future, a young woman leads a rebellion against an oppressive government that controls its citizens through fear.
A family moves into a haunted house and must uncover the dark secret of its previous occupants before it's too late.
A retired hitman is forced back into action when his daughter is kidnapped by a powerful criminal organization.
A young woman falls in love with a charming stranger only to discover he is hiding a dangerous secret.
An archaeologist races against time to find an ancient artifact before it falls into the hands of a cult.
A group of survivors must band together after a zombie apocalypse transforms civilization into chaos.
A misfit group of superheroes must overcome their differences to save the world from an alien invasion.
Two rival chefs compete in a prestigious cooking competition while developing unexpected feelings for each other.
A stand-up comedian deals with the consequences of a viral joke that offends an entire community.
A forensic scientist discovers evidence that links a powerful politician to a series of cold case murders.
A young elf embarks on a quest to retrieve a stolen magical artifact from the dark kingdom across the mountains.
Three friends plan an elaborate heist to rob the most secure vault in the country using their unique skills.
A small-town girl moves to the big city to pursue her dream of becoming a famous singer.
An alien crash-lands on Earth and must find a way back home while evading government agents.
A couple tries to rekindle their romance during a vacation to Italy but face unexpected challenges.
A group of paranormal investigators explore an abandoned asylum and encounter terrifying supernatural entities.
A brave knight must rescue a kidnapped princess from a dragon while navigating treacherous political alliances.
A rebellious teenager discovers that her seemingly normal parents are actually secret government spies.
A time traveler accidentally changes history and must fix the timeline before reality unravels.
Two best friends go on a wild road trip after one of them gets dumped, leading to hilarious misadventures.
A young woman inherits a mysterious estate and uncovers dark family secrets hidden in its walls.
A sorcerer's apprentice must master ancient magic to defeat a demon threatening to consume the world.
A marine biologist discovers a hidden underwater civilization while investigating mysterious ocean phenomena.
A haunted lighthouse keeper must confront the ghosts of sailors who died in a shipwreck he caused.
A hitman falls in love with his target and must choose between his mission and his heart.
A group of teenagers use a time machine to prevent their school from being demolished.
An undercover detective infiltrates a drug cartel but begins to question his own loyalties.
A princess must choose between her duty to her kingdom and her love for a commoner knight.
Scientists create an artificial intelligence that becomes self-aware and begins to question its existence.
A treasure hunter discovers an ancient map leading to a legendary city of gold hidden in the Amazon.
A family is terrorized by an invisible entity that feeds on their deepest fears and darkest secrets.
A charming rogue must win back his ex-girlfriend while simultaneously trying to save his failing business.
A retired assassin discovers her past has come back to haunt her when old enemies target her family.
Two strangers are forced to share a cabin during a blizzard and discover unexpected common ground.
A young boy discovers a magical portal in his basement that leads to a world of dragons and wizards.
A space crew awakens from hibernation to find themselves far off course and something lurking in the ship.
A group of extreme athletes attempt to climb the world's deadliest mountain in record time.
A detective with a photographic memory investigates a conspiracy that reaches the highest levels of government.
A town is terrorized by a creature that only attacks on the night of a full moon.
A struggling writer finds inspiration in an old diary that reveals a tragic love story from the past.
A hapless inventor accidentally creates a machine that turns everything it touches into gold.
A mercenary is hired to protect a witness who holds information that could bring down a corrupt empire.
